_guide: These helper fields are safe for editing guidance. The app ignores keys that start with _. Edit the nearby real values, not the _guide text.

ui._comment: Shared UI labels used across the site.

hero._comment: Homepage hero section. Edit the rotatingTexts array to change the animated words.
hero.title: Two Lions

introText._comment: Homepage IntroText section. listTitle/listItems control the horizontal loop carousel. divisionsTitle/divisions and geographicFocusTitle/geographicFocus control the cards below it.
introText.title: Two Lions International Corporation
listItems: Development of renewable energy and infrastructure projects.
Development of sports-related initiatives and events.
Development of media, publishing and digital communication projects.
Ownership and management of intellectual property, trademarks and brands.
introText.body: The company is engaged in strategic planning, business development, brand and intellectual property management, and investment in entrepreneurial initiatives.

sections._comment: TwoLionsDivisions section on the homepage. title controls the section heading. items contains the division cards.
sections.title: Business Divisions

investmentSection._comment: InvestmentSection on the homepage. eyebrow1/title/lead control the intro. eyebrow2 is reused above the continuous carousel. highlights controls the left card. pillars controls the moving cards.
investmentSection.title: Strategic Partnerships & Investment Opportunities
investmentSection.lead: Two Lions International Corporation is actively exploring strategic partnerships and potential investment opportunities with U.S. and international investors, with particular attention to the Energy & Infrastructure sector.
paragraphs: The company is developing proprietary concepts focused on infrastructure enhancement, renewable energy integration and identity-based advertising solutions known as Identity Advertising. These concepts are designed to combine public utility infrastructure with long-term brand visibility and territorial enhancement.

The corporation intends to hold, develop and commercialize the related intellectual property rights, trademarks, business models and licensing opportunities, creating a structure for long-term industrial and commercial development.

pillars.title: Strategic Partnerships
pillars.body: The section presents the company as open to structured partnerships, capital relationships and industrial dialogue with selected investors.

pillars.title: Proprietary Concepts
pillars.body: Current development includes concepts that connect infrastructure utility, renewable systems and Identity Advertising in a single long-horizon framework.

pillars.title: IP & Licensing
pillars.body: The business model includes ownership, protection and commercialization of trademarks, intellectual property, operating formats and licensing opportunities.

identityAdvertisingPage._comment: Identity Advertising page. sections is the main content grid; each section has id, title, items and optional note.
identityAdvertisingPage.title: Identity Advertising
identityAdvertisingPage.mission: Transform public and private spaces into permanent identity assets for companies, public bodies and institutions.
positioningItems: Permanent identity infrastructure for brands, public bodies and institutions.
Integration of public utility, brand presence and territorial enhancement.
A modular approach across urban, mobility, sport, corporate, premium and media.
identityAdvertisingPage.heroImagePlaceholder: Space reserved for a hero image or a project rendering.
identityAdvertisingPage.programTitle: Public Utility, Brand Presence, Territorial Value
identityAdvertisingPage.programLead: The program brings together projects that turn urban spaces, mobility nodes, sports venues and corporate sites into permanent assets of identity, usability and communication.
frameworkParagraphs: Two Lions Identity Advertising structures permanent solutions where physical infrastructure, naming, sponsorship and media content work as one system.
The approach supports projects for municipalities, regions, private companies, mobility operators and major public or commercial platforms.
identityAdvertisingPage.frameworkImagePlaceholder: Space for concept visuals, mockups or environmental renders.
focusItems: Premium modules for airports, ports, stations and major events.
Media layer for storytelling, video and sponsor reporting.

sections.title: Identity Mobility
sections.note: Natural integration with the energy and infrastructure division being developed with Ajo Energia and Sagelio.
